claim: The wafer scale engine (WSE) is 46,250 square millimeters, roughly the size of a dinner plate, compared to traditional chips which max out at 750 square millimeters
actionable: When evaluating AI hardware, use wafer-scale processors for unmatched raw compute density and size advantages over conventional CPUs/GPUs
source_title: Inside Cerebras's Insane NEW Data Center (Fastest in the World)

claim: By keeping all memory on-chip instead of off-chip, Cerebras achieves 2500x faster memory latency and eliminates the primary bottleneck that makes GPUs slow at inference
actionable: When designing inference systems, prioritize on-chip memory to eliminate off-chip memory latency which is the primary inference bottleneck
source_title: Inside Cerebras's Insane NEW Data Center (Fastest in the World)

claim: Liquid cooling enables data centers to maintain precise temperature control; chilled water is heated to 42 degrees before entering wafers and returns at 70 degrees to prevent condensation
actionable: Use liquid cooling with controlled temperature deltas (15 degrees) to maximize hardware efficiency and prevent moisture damage in high-density compute facilities
source_title: Inside Cerebras's Insane NEW Data Center (Fastest in the World)
